title: selaginella filicaulis
intro: Selaginella filicaulis, also known as the spikemoss, is a small, evergreen plant belonging to the Selaginella genus, which is a group of vascular plants that resemble ferns but have a unique life cycle. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its extracts showing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella filicaulis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in tinctures and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
